audience: Self-employed professionals and SMEs with a new or existing Google Business Profile who want to audit and improve their local presence step by step
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's een controleerbare audit geven om hun bestaande Google Business Profiel correct, volledig, betrouwbaar en meetbaar te beheren

searchIntent.question: How can an SME audit and optimise its Google Business Profile without breaching Google's policies?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs in Limburg, Belgium and the wider Belgian market

directAnswer: A Google Business Profile checklist verifies that customers see accurate information in Google Search and Maps, understand the offer and can call, request directions or visit the website without friction. Optimisation means making every visible detail accurate, current, specific and demonstrably connected to the real business, not adding as many fields or keywords as possible.
title: Optimise your Google Business Profile: practical SME checklist
metaDescription: Optimise your Google Business Profile with an audit of categories, service areas, services, photos, reviews and performance using this practical SME checklist.
h1: Optimise your Google Business Profile: practical checklist for SMEs

internalLinks.anchor: local SEO for SMEs in Limburg
complete guide to building a website
why a fast website can perform better

factsToPreserve: Google describes local results through relevance, distance and prominence; distance cannot be optimised away and nobody can buy or guarantee a better position
A fully online business without in-person customer contact is not automatically eligible for a Business Profile
A service-area business normally has one profile for its central location unless separate staffed locations genuinely exist
The real-world business name must not be padded with services, place names or slogans
Google allows up to twenty service areas and says the overall area should generally remain within about two hours' drive of the base
A home address should be hidden when customers are not received there
A profile view, call click or website click is not proof of a lead or sale
Complete information does not guarantee a higher Google Maps position or an AI-search ranking
The profile should be reviewed monthly and receive a fuller audit quarterly, with urgent business changes updated immediately
